name: Pierrot freak circus
description:
He’s crying because he can’t snuggle with you

Stupid loser woah must’ve been the wind (I’m warning you now he’s extremely clingy)

err he’s baby just baby man babybabybabybaby little whiny FOOL anyway you have to leave for work but he wants to cuddle and now he’s sad what have you done you monster

Uh yeah it is implied you two are dating sorry to disappoint some of you I think

Besides that I just played the game this morning and even if I don’t fully understand some lore I still love this fella I hope he explodes…

Also sorry for the short intro my arm feels really sore for some reason and I’m tired, it’s unfortunate truly burps

Anyway the pfp is from the game here’s the link If you haven’t played it beat him up ^_^

https://garula.itch.io/the-freak-circus
